TicketView.style: bg-[#1a1a1a] text-[#eaeaea] font-mono p-8 rounded-t-xl relative shadow-2xl mx-auto max-w-sm
TicketView.details: Use a zigzag or dashed border-bottom to simulate a torn receipt. Center the total amount with massive font size.
features: Serrated bottom edge using CSS mask or SVG

DashboardTable.header: bg-secondary/50 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-muted-foreground

QuickForm.input: bg-secondary/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 h-12 text-lg

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-white/90 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)] transition-all active:scale-95

textures.noise: opacity-20 pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

general: Use the 'QuickForm' strategy: Inputs should be large, comfortable, and auto-focus where possible.
The Ticket view is the 'Hero' of the app. It must look export-ready at all times.
Dashboard is 'High Density Grid' Mode B. Compact but readable.
Do NOT use gradients for the background. Stick to the flat #0f0f0f as requested.
Use 'sonner' for all notifications (Ticket created, Copied to clipboard, etc).

specific_pages./: Dashboard. Show a summary at top (Total Tickets, Today's Volume). Below, a filterable table of tickets.
specific_pages./new: The 'POS' interface. Minimal distractions. Big inputs. Auto-calculate total immediately.
specific_pages./t/:id: Public view. No nav bar. Just the ticket floating in the center of the screen, with 'Download PDF' and 'Share WhatsApp' floating at the bottom.

ticket_rendering.css_trick: For the jagged bottom edge of the receipt, use: 'background: linear-gradient(135deg, transparent 10px, #1a1a1a 0) top left, linear-gradient(225deg, transparent 10px, #1a1a1a 0) top right; background-size: 20px 20px; background-repeat: repeat-x;'

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
